productName: Honey Stixx - 2pk - Live Resin Infused Preroll - Batter - Pineapple Express X Maui Wowie
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Pineapple Express X Maui Wowie flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of pineapple, tropical, and citrus, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
